svg.title: CrisisNexus high-level system architecture
svg.desc: Three-zone architecture: input layer with four external data sources, Firebase processing layer containing signal ingestion, batching engine, CIRO Gemini AI, confidence filter, crisis storage, resource allocation engine, and ReliefCycle, and output layer with NGO admin dashboard and citizen mobile app.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Weather API signal contain in CrisisNexus?')

sendPrompt('Explain the full CIRO Gemini AI pipeline inside CrisisNexus')

sendPrompt('Explain the crises Firestore collection schema')
